title: Carex panduranganii
taxonomy: Carex panduranganii is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Carex and is native to the Western Ghats of India. As a member of the Carex genus, it is classified within the subfamily Caricoideae. Within the subfamily, it is part of the tribe Cariceae. Its classification makes it a part of the larger family Cyperaceae, which includes various species of sedges and rushes.

The plant is rich in health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to potentially aid in the management of various conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
